pre_game.message: Hey, I'm E. It's a bit of a strange situation we've all found ourselves in, isn't it? What's your plan for when this thing finally kicks off?
Nice to meet you, E. I'm F. It's definitely a weird vibe in here. Honestly, I'm just trying to stay focused—I've got people counting on me to bring something back. How about you, any strategy yet?
I’m in the same boat—got people back home I can’t let down. No set strategy yet, just trying to stay sharp and see how everyone plays it.
I totally get that—the pressure is real when people are counting on you. Hopefully, we can both walk away with what we need.
Definitely. It’d be nice if we could find a way to both come out ahead once the game actually starts.
I'm definitely open to that; if we can find a way to look out for each other, we might both have a better shot at the prize.
I like the sound of that. It's definitely better to have an ally than to try and navigate this alone.
Absolutely. Let's keep an eye on how the others are acting and stick together once the game gets moving.
For sure. It’s good to have someone I can trust in here before things get crazy.
Definitely. I’m going to go talk to some of the others and see where their heads are at, but I've got your back.
Sounds like a plan. I'll do the same and see what I can find out. Catch you later, F.

post_game.message: Great coordination! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share and reached the best possible outcome.
I agree, it was a great outcome. I'm glad we were able to coordinate effectively for the best result.
